notes: Host only -- not also a client. Resolves the row 7 'unverified' flag from the first-pass CSV: Mac cannot act as a stream client. iCloud + Tailscale via the iCloud Drive relay file, or Local Wi-Fi, or Manual Tailscale.

Host only -- not also a client. Resolves the row 8 'unverified' flag from the first-pass CSV: Windows cannot act as a stream client. Same 3 modes as Mac -- iCloud Drive relay (ICloudEndpointWriter) carries the Tailscale address for automatic discovery when both a Tailscale address and cert pin exist.

Updates native_streaming from 'pending' (v0.1.3 release notes, 2026-07-19) to confirmed working. icloud_relay=false: Synology does not implement the iCloud Drive relay Mac/Windows use, so no automatic iCloud + Tailscale discovery -- Apple clients pair via Manual Tailscale instead. Local Wi-Fi also available. Reads its own attached/network storage directly, not iCloud.

Unchanged from first pass. "Released iOS / visionOS apps with Docker: Not supported yet." Free server + free browser reader (port 7343) both work today; no native-app connection flow exists yet, not even Local Wi-Fi. Reads its own attached/network storage directly, not iCloud.

Primary client. All 3 modes available: iCloud + Tailscale (automatic, via a Tailscale+icloud_relay-capable host), Manual Tailscale (explicit fallback, or the only Tailscale option against a non-icloud_relay host like Synology), Local Wi-Fi.
Corrects the first-pass CSV: visionOS is also a standalone reader, not client-only. Same 3 connection modes as iPhone/iPad -- reuses the same iCloud/Bonjour/manual discovery code.

Unchanged from first pass. LAN-HTTPS-only by design -- no iCloud Documents entitlement (physical signing test), Tailscale path built and tested but shipped disabled pending upstream tailscale/tailscale client bugs (#9736, #13991, #12139, #11663). No local/iCloud content source -- no standalone library on the box itself.
Standalone app is live; no streaming client today. "Coming soon" is the stated intent, confirmed still accurate as of this review. No iCloud or SMB/NAS source today.

Not yet built. Planned as Local Wi-Fi only when it ships, not Tailscale -- narrower than the android-tv-full-port-plan.md doc's mention of an 'independently validated optional Tailscale fallback.' No local/iCloud content source -- no standalone library.
